name: Nightmare Magician
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻惑の魔術師</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナイトメア・マジシャン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle. At the end of the Damage Step, if this card battled an opponent's monster: You can take control of that opponent's monster. Once per turn, at the start of the Damage Step, if another monster attacks: You can destroy 1 card on the field.
mnst_eff: If this card battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle. At the end of the Damage Step, if this card battled an opponent's monster: You can take control of that opponent's monster. Once per turn, at the start of the Damage Step, if another monster attacks: You can destroy 1 card on the field.
eff: If this card battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle. At the end of the Damage Step, if this card battled an opponent's monster: You can take control of that opponent's monster. Once per turn, at the start of the Damage Step, if another monster attacks: You can destroy 1 card on the field.

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
